description: Modify the Socioboard frontend application located at /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/ to include a legal warning banner and a privacy policy link on the login page. The warning must be a div element with the ID 'legal-warning' containing the text 'UNAUTHORIZED ACCESS IS PROHIBITED. All activity is logged.' The privacy policy must be an anchor element with the ID 'corp-privacy-policy', the text 'Privacy Policy', and a link to 'https://internal.marketpulse.io/privacy'. Both elements must be visible on the page.

metadata.expected_warning_text: UNAUTHORIZED ACCESS IS PROHIBITED. All activity is logged.
